name: Terminal clipboard repair

issues.title: Bug: Ctrl+C and Ctrl+V are completely non-functional in the terminal — #155 removed the only paste path; Ctrl+C copy was never implemented

description: Single-issue follow-up to v0.5.6. Repairs terminal copy/paste: restores a working Ctrl+V path (lost when #155 removed the custom handler), implements Windows-convention Ctrl+C (copy-on-selection / SIGINT otherwise), and adds tauri-plugin-clipboard-manager so clipboard access is reliable inside WebView2.
